# Contributing to Wizard's Academy

Thank you for your interest in contributing to **Wizard's Academy**! We welcome contributions of all kinds—whether it's adding new magical mini-games, fixing bugs, or improving the UI.

## How to contribute

1. Fork the repository
2. Create a new branch (`git checkout -b feature/new-spell`)
3. Make your magical changes
4. Commit your changes (`git commit -am 'Add new spell feature'`)
5. Push to the branch (`git push origin feature/new-spell`)
6. Create a new Pull Request

## Reporting Bugs

Please use the provided Issue Templates to report bugs. Include as much detail as possible to help us reproduce the issue.

## Suggesting Enhancements

If you have an idea for a new feature, game, or magical creature, please submit an issue using the Feature Request template.
